title: epigynium neilgherense
intro: Epigynium neilgherense, also known as the Neilgherries epigynium, is a rare and endangered flowering plant species native to the Western Ghats in India. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, and is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is traditionally prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Epigynium neilgherense have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, among other health conditions.
